subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down in truth from the presence of the Wronged One unto him who hath turned toward the Most Exalted Horizon and hearkened unto the rustling of the Divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی المظلوم لمن اقبل الی الافق الاعلی و سمع حفیف سدره
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation
